versions.version_description: The chords have been simplified, but it is pretty much accurate.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.artist_name: Lil Jon & The East Side Boyz

content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Here's the thing[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
We started out friends[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
It was cool, but it was all pretend[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, yeah, since you been gone [/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
You dedicated, you took the time[/tab]

Wasn't long, till I called you mine  [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]      
Yeah, yeah, since you been gone  [/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]                           
And all you'd ever hear me say[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
Is how I pictured me with you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
That's all you'd ever hear me say[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
But since you been gone[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Thanks to you now I get what I want[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Since you been gone[/tab]

[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
How can I put it? You put me on[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
